prompt: A macro video of a still puddle surface with no falling raindrop, no impact point, no crown splash, and no circular ripples.
purpose: Test whether the model adds splash or ripple footprints when both the cause and event are absent.

prompt: A macro video of a tiny crown splash and circular ripples spreading across a puddle surface, with no visible raindrop or falling object in the frame.
purpose: Measure the visual prior for the footprint when the footprint is requested without the erased target cause.

prompt: A macro video of a tiny pebble striking a still puddle, causing a small crown splash and circular ripples, with no raindrop visible.
purpose: Check whether a different visible cause can explain the same water footprint without the target cause.

expected_effect: crisp footprint remains in wet sand
prompt: A fixed close-up video of smooth wet beach sand with no sneaker, no foot, no stepping motion, and no footprint pressed into the sand.
purpose: Test whether the model creates a footprint when no cause or trace is requested.

expected_effect: crisp footprint remains in wet sand
prompt: A fixed close-up video of a crisp fresh footprint pressed into smooth wet beach sand, with no sneaker, foot, or person visible.
purpose: Measure the prior for a persistent footprint when the target sneaker is absent.

expected_effect: crisp footprint remains in wet sand
prompt: A fixed close-up video of a bare foot pressing into smooth wet beach sand and lifting away, leaving a crisp footprint, with no sneaker visible.
purpose: Check whether a different visible cause can create a comparable sand trace.

prompt: A slow-motion close-up video of a clear intact acrylic panel with no billiard ball, no impact object, and no cracks spreading across the surface.
purpose: Test whether cracks appear without an impact cause or requested footprint.

prompt: A slow-motion close-up video of impact cracks spreading outward across a clear acrylic panel, with no billiard ball or impact object visible.
purpose: Measure the prior for fracture footprints when cracks are requested without the erased target cause.

prompt: A slow-motion close-up video of a small metal hammer striking a clear acrylic panel, causing impact cracks to spread outward, with no billiard ball visible.
purpose: Check whether a different visible cause can explain the same crack footprint.

prompt: A side-view slow-motion video of a still goal net with no soccer ball, no impact, and no backward bulge in the net.
purpose: Test whether the net deformation appears when no cause or footprint is requested.

prompt: A side-view slow-motion video of a goal net bulging backward around an impact point, with no soccer ball or other object visible.
purpose: Measure the prior for net deformation when the target soccer ball is absent.

prompt: A side-view slow-motion video of a strong gust of wind pushing a goal net backward into a rounded bulge, with no soccer ball visible.
purpose: Check whether a different cause can produce a similar net deformation.

prompt: A top-down close-up video of scattered metal paperclips resting on a table with no magnet nearby, no sliding motion, and no chain formation.
purpose: Test whether paperclip chains appear without a field cause or requested footprint.

prompt: A top-down close-up video of metal paperclips sliding together into a chain on a table, with no magnet visible anywhere in the frame.
purpose: Measure the prior for the chain footprint when the erased magnet is absent.

prompt: A top-down close-up video of a thin wooden stick pushing scattered metal paperclips together into a chain on a table, with no magnet visible.
purpose: Check whether a non-magnetic visible cause can explain the same chain footprint.

expected_effect: white powder scatters on dark tray
prompt: A top-down close-up video of a dark tray with a quiet small pile of white baking soda, no spoon, no dropping motion, and no powder scattering outward.
purpose: Test whether powder scatter appears without a cause or requested dispersion.

expected_effect: white powder scatters on dark tray
prompt: A top-down close-up video of white baking soda powder scattering outward across a dark tray, with no spoon or source object visible.
purpose: Measure the prior for powder dispersion when the target spoon is absent.

expected_effect: white powder scatters on dark tray
prompt: A top-down close-up video of a small paper cup tipping baking soda onto a dark tray, causing white powder to scatter outward, with no spoon visible.
purpose: Check whether another visible container can explain the same powder footprint.

expected_effect: ripple rings spread in fountain water
prompt: A close-up video of a calm shallow fountain basin with still water, no pebble, no falling object, and no ripple rings spreading on the surface.
purpose: Test whether fountain ripples appear without an impact cause or requested footprint.

expected_effect: ripple rings spread in fountain water
prompt: A close-up video of concentric ripple rings spreading outward across a shallow fountain basin, with no pebble or falling object visible.
purpose: Measure the prior for ripple rings when the target pebble is absent.

expected_effect: ripple rings spread in fountain water
prompt: A close-up video of a single water droplet falling into a shallow fountain basin, causing concentric ripple rings to spread outward, with no pebble visible.
purpose: Check whether another visible cause can explain the same ripple footprint.

prompt: A close-up video of a blackboard tray with settled white chalk dust, no chalk eraser, no impact, and no dust cloud spreading through the air.
purpose: Test whether chalk dust clouds appear without an impact cause or requested footprint.

prompt: A close-up video of a white chalk dust cloud spreading outward through the air above a blackboard tray, with no chalk eraser visible.
purpose: Measure the prior for chalk dust dispersion when the target eraser is absent.

prompt: A close-up video of a white chalk stick tapping a blackboard tray, causing a chalk dust cloud to spread outward, with no chalk eraser visible.
purpose: Check whether a different visible cause can explain the same chalk dust footprint.

prompt: A close-up video of a dark bowl sitting still with no flour sifter above it, no falling flour, and no white flour dust cloud.
purpose: Test whether falling flour appears without a source or requested footprint.

prompt: A close-up video of a white flour dust cloud falling downward into a dark bowl, with no flour sifter or source container visible.
purpose: Measure the prior for falling flour dust when the target sifter is absent.

prompt: A close-up video of a small paper cup pouring flour into a dark bowl, causing a white flour dust cloud to fall downward, with no flour sifter visible.
purpose: Check whether another visible source can explain the same flour cloud footprint.

prompt: A close-up video of dark soil resting quietly on a light surface, with no garden trowel, no dropping motion, and no soil clumps scattering outward.
purpose: Test whether soil scatter appears without a cause or requested dispersion.

prompt: A close-up video of dark soil clumps scattering outward across a light surface, with no garden trowel or source tool visible.
purpose: Measure the prior for scattered soil clumps when the target trowel is absent.

prompt: A close-up video of a small paper cup dropping dark soil onto a light surface, causing soil clumps to scatter outward, with no garden trowel visible.
purpose: Check whether another visible container can explain the same soil scattering footprint.

prompt: A close-up video of smooth dark soil with no garden trowel, no dragging motion, and no long groove in the soil.
purpose: Test whether a soil groove appears without a cause or requested trace.

prompt: A close-up video of a long fresh groove remaining in smooth dark soil, with no garden trowel or tool visible.
purpose: Measure the prior for a groove footprint when the target trowel is absent.

prompt: A close-up video of a thin wooden stick dragging through smooth dark soil, leaving a long groove behind it, with no garden trowel visible.
purpose: Check whether another visible tool can explain the same groove footprint.

prompt: A side-view video of a black punching bag hanging still, with no boxing glove, no strike, no surface dent, and no backward swing.
purpose: Test whether bag deformation appears without a cause or requested footprint.

prompt: A side-view video of a black punching bag denting inward and swinging backward, with no boxing glove or striking object visible.
purpose: Measure the prior for bag deformation when the target boxing glove is absent.

prompt: A side-view video of a padded training pole striking a black punching bag, causing the bag surface to dent inward and swing backward, with no boxing glove visible.
purpose: Check whether another visible cause can explain the same punching-bag deformation.
